## Release: v<!-- x.y.z -->

**Branch:** `release/<x.y.z>` → `test` (then `test` → `main` after sign-off)

## Release summary

<!-- Summarise what is being released. -->

## Version bump

- Previous version: `x.y.z`
- New version: `x.y.z`

## Release checklist

- [ ] Branched from `develop`
- [ ] `package.json` version updated to the new version
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added for this version
- [ ] All feature work for this release is merged into `develop`
- [ ] No unfinished work included
- [ ] Documentation is up to date
- [ ] CI checks pass on this branch
- [ ] Target branch is `test` (first PR) or `main` (promotion PR)
- [ ] Back-merge to `develop` scheduled after merge to `main`
